label: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 21

extraction.one_line_summary: GROVES Caden won Stage 21 Madrid sprint after EVENEPOEL Remco's aggressive counterattack to breakaway forced Groves to chase for green jersey security.
tactical_patterns: EVENEPOEL Remco counterattacked intermediate sprint breakaway forcing GROVES to abandon sprinter conservation tactics to protect green jersey mathematically.
BORA's DENZ and KAMNA double-rider breakaway selection maximized finale positioning but both hesitated leading, allowing peloton compression sub-1km.
POGACAR Filippo joined elite breakaway but UAE teammates refused chase duty, revealing team's stage 21 ceremonial rather than competitive posture.

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: positive: counterattacked breakaway despite securing white jersey, attempting stage win that would threaten Groves' green mathematically
rider_signals.GROVES Caden: positive: sacrificed sprinter positioning to chase Evenepoel breakaway personally, calculating jersey defense outweighed optimal sprint preparation
rider_signals.POGACAR Filippo: neutral: selected into quality breakaway but lacked teammate support for sustained effort, suggesting UAE prioritized ceremony over stage hunting
rider_signals.DENZ Nico: negative: hesitated leading finale despite BORA's numerical breakaway advantage with Kamna, allowing gap compression from 20 to contestable
rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: neutral: completed Jumbo-Visma podium lockout 1-2-3, rare grand tour outcome revealing team's depth dominance pattern
